name: clawcast-studio
description: Claworld branded Mac recording cockpit for AI creator videos, with a visible profile card and protected teleprompter.
author: David

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/control.js && node --check src/renderer/overlay.js && node --check src/renderer/prompter.js && node --check src/renderer/region.js && node --check scripts/create-local-app.js

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: 爪播需要访问摄像头，用于录课名片里的真人画面。
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: 爪播需要访问麦克风，用于录制你的讲解声音。
